title: Steamed Portuguese-Style Garlicky Greens Wrap
description: A delicious and healthy wrap filled with steamed garlicky greens wrapped in a tender leaf wrap.
instructions: 1. Preheat the steamer basket with boiling water.
2. Add the garlicky greens to the steamer basket and steam for 5 minutes.
3. In a pan, heat some oil and sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
4. Add the steamed garlicky greens to the pan and toss with garlic.
5. Warm the Portuguese-Style Wrap in the microwave for 10 seconds.
6. Assemble the wrap by placing the garlicky greens on the wrap.
7. Serve the wrap with a side of leaf for garnish.
